description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/pantomath-io/panto/panto-build:8b1b1517 with a before_script that sets sysctl, exports LONG_VERSION and SHORT_VERSION from the VERSION file, sets NODE_ENV=production and cd to the project directory, and a Go module cache at /go/pkg/mod. Define stages build, test, quality, distribute and release. In the build stage add build_agent (GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org/ go mod download && make -B panto-agent, artifacts bin/), build_server (go mod download && make -B panto panto-ctl, artifacts bin/), build_watch (VUE_APP_PANTO_SERVER_URL="https://api.panto.watch" make -B panto-watch, artifacts watch/dist) and build_web (make -B panto-web, artifacts web/dist), all running on develop and master branches with retry 1. In the test stage add code_coverage (make coverage) and code_coverage_report (make coveragehtml, then scp coverage.html to panto@web.pantomath.io:/var/www/engineering.panto.io/coverage/index.html) each using services influxdb:1.5-alpine, redis:latest, memcached:1.5-alpine, mysql:latest, postgres:10-alpine, docker:dind and several aliased services, and setting MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD and POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables. In the quality stage add format_code (diff -u <(echo -n) <(gofmt -s -d .)), ineffectual_assignment (ineffassign *), and lint_code (make lint), all skipping commits whose message starts with WIP. In the distribute stage add apt_repository (ssh-agent, ssh-add, gpg import, then ./add_to_repo.sh for two .deb packages, only on master), binaries_edge (prepare edge binaries, tar them, rsync to packages.panto.app/bin/edge/, only on develop), binaries_stable (prepare stable binaries, tar, create a symlink to stable, rsync to packages.panto.app/bin/, only on master), landing_production (make docs, rsync www/about to https://about.panto.app, only on master) and landing_staging (same on develop), each with retry 1. In the release stage add docker_build (triggered on changes to docker/Dockerfile-build on develop, login to registry, docker build -t $DOCKER_BUILD_IMAGE_NAME:latest -f docker/Dockerfile-build ., push), docker_image (on develop and master, login, build and push server, agent, watch, web and all‑in‑one images with tag $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG), docker_tag_edge (on develop, pull each image, tag :edge, push) and docker_tag_stable (on master, pull each image, tag with $LONG_VERSION, $SHORT_VERSION and latest, push), all using the docker:latest image with docker:dind service.
